Krado One — A DevX Platform Portal

One platform for all your
engineering portals. incident workflows. runbook execution. cloud visibility. developer tooling.

Self-hosted portals for incidents, tasks, service catalog, runbooks, cloud costs, and security. Deployed in minutes. Owned forever.

Get started for free → Read the docs
10+
Built-in portals
$0
Free community tier
Go + React
Single binary
Docker
One compose file
Portals

Everything ships on day one

No plugins, no marketplace. Every portal is built in — toggle what your team needs.

01
✅Task ManagementFree

Kanban board with full JIRA two-way sync. Scans Slack messages and emails for action items automatically. Priority labels, due dates, per-team stats.

Kanban BoardJIRA Two-way SyncSlack ScanningEmail ScanningPriority LabelsDue Dates
∞
no seat limits
02
🚨DRM — Incident TrackerFree

Full incident lifecycle from detection to post-mortem. Severity triage, root cause analysis, maintenance windows, affected products and customer tracking.

Severity TriageRCA FilingMaintenance WindowsCustomer ImpactResolution Metrics
MTTR
tracked automatically
03
⚙️DevX PortalFree

Service catalog with ownership, golden path templates, DORA metrics per team, scorecards, interactive dependency graph, and per-service ops dashboard.

Service CatalogGolden PathsDORA MetricsScorecardsDependency GraphOps Dashboard
4
DORA metrics
04
⚡Platform EngineeringFree

Tech radar, CI/CD pipeline visibility, API catalog, change request workflows, environment promotions, public status page, and team onboarding flows.

Tech RadarCI/CD TrackingAPI CatalogChange RequestsEnv PromotionsStatus Page
8
sub-modules
05
📋Runbook PortalPro

Build and execute operational runbooks with typed steps: HTTP, Shell, Jira, Slack, and MCP server calls. AI picks the right runbook from a natural language query.

HTTP StepsShell StepsMCP ServersAI SelectionLive OutputSafety Validation
MCP
tool integration
06
☁️Cloud & FinOpsPro

AWS, GCP, and Azure resource inventory with cost breakdown, FinOps dashboards, budget alerts, and per-team spend allocation across environments.

AWSGCPAzureCost BreakdownBudget AlertsTeam Allocation
3
cloud providers
07
🛡️Security & CompliancePro

CVE tracking, secrets rotation inventory, SOC 2 and ISO 27001 control mapping with evidence collection. Fully self-hosted — no data ever leaves your infrastructure.

CVE TrackingSecrets InventorySOC 2ISO 27001Evidence Mapping
0
external calls
08
🤖AI AssistantPro

OpenAI-powered chat with session history. Ask about services, trigger runbooks by natural language, summarize incidents, query your org knowledge base.

Session HistoryRunbook TriggersIncident SummaryService QueriesOpenAI
AI
powered by OpenAI
Setup

Running in under 5 minutes

One Docker Compose file. No cloud account, no build toolchain on your host.

1
Pull the image

Single Docker Compose file. Backend, frontend, and database in one command.

2
Run the setup wizard

Create your org and admin account on first launch — under 60 seconds.

3
Connect your tools

Add Jira, Slack, AWS via env vars or the Portal Config UI. No YAML files.

4
Invite your team

Add members, assign roles, toggle the portals your team needs.

# grab the compose file
curl -O https://raw.githubusercontent.com/
sir-vikk/krado-one/main/deploy/docker/
docker-compose.yml
# start everything
docker compose up -d
# open in browser
open http://localhost
✓ Krado One is ready
Integrations

Plugs into your stack

🔵 Jira💬 Slack🟠 AWS🔵 Azure🟡 Google Cloud🤖 OpenAI🔐 HashiCorp Vault🏗️ Terraform☸️ Kubernetes📡 MCP Servers📊 Grafana🚀 ArgoCD 🔵 Jira💬 Slack🟠 AWS🔵 Azure🟡 Google Cloud🤖 OpenAI🔐 HashiCorp Vault🏗️ Terraform☸️ Kubernetes📡 MCP Servers📊 Grafana🚀 ArgoCD
🔥 PagerDuty📈 Prometheus🔒 SAML/OIDC🔱 Datadog🐙 GitLab⚡ GitHub Actions🐳 Docker📩 Email/SMTP🔑 LDAP🌊 Argo Workflows 🔥 PagerDuty📈 Prometheus🔒 SAML/OIDC🔱 Datadog🐙 GitLab⚡ GitHub Actions🐳 Docker📩 Email/SMTP🔑 LDAP🌊 Argo Workflows

✓
Self-hosted

Your data never leaves your infra

No vendor lock-in. No telemetry. No per-seat pricing as you scale. Deploy anywhere Docker runs.

Start deploying →
🔒
Your data stays with you
SQLite or PostgreSQL on your infrastructure. No telemetry, no external calls.
⚡
Single binary
Go backend + React SPA. No Node.js runtime, no microservices, no Kubernetes required.
🔌
Offline license validation
Pro licenses validate via HMAC — works in air-gapped environments, zero external calls.
🛠️
Feature flags built in
Toggle portals per environment from the admin panel or API. No config files.
Krado One
